notes: 3.12.13+3.12.14 — PHASE 4 + PHASE 5 HE 🩺 HOAN TAT LO TRINH (45 phep/10 nhom du thiet ke; FLAG_PH_BLOCKING van TAT theo chot — chi bat sau ≥2 ky that + 0 RED ton + FP<20% tung phep). P4: (1) SNAPSHOT khi khoa ky: inputsHash + resultsHash (SHA-256 canonical theo LOAI field: VND int, USD 2dp, cong/ty le 4dp — _phCanonNum) + engineHashes + paramsHash + snapshotVersion/canonicalizationVersion/healthCheckVersion + rowCount + totals; (2) KHOA KY DI QUA PRE-CLOSE: payPeriodLock → man kiem du 45 phep + doi chieu ack HIEU LUC (sourceHash khop trang thai item hien tai — ack stale bi loai); dat chuan (0 RED + du ack) hien nut Khoa; chua dat van cho khoa kem canh bao warn-only (se chan khi bat P4); snapshot tu ghi khi khoa; (3) 4 phep N10: ky khoa thieu snapshot (ky cu chi nhac nhe) · n10_tampered RED so hash lai vs snapshot (bat sua len inputs/results/so dong; snapshotVersion khac se so theo bo quy tac rieng — khong RED oan) · nguon (the/khoan PS) tao SAU khoa cham ky · ack het hieu luc thong ke; (4) CONG BLOCKING de san: phBlockingSync doc cache (sync) chan 4 buoc approve/payslip/bank/post khi FLAG bat; phGateKick refresh cache moi checkpoint (fire-and-forget khi warn-only, toast nhac RED lien quan); phRun ho tro phep ASYNC. P5: (5) store hrTaxAttrs sync (cu tru + NPT effective-dated, version, auditTrail; ket thuc hieu luc bang ⏹, khong sua de); UI khoi 'Cu tru & NPT' trong man 🗂 Ho so thue nam (them/ket thuc); (6) 4 phep cuoi: NPT TRUNG MST giua nhieu NV (hieu luc chong) RED · NV co thue chua khai cu tru (chi khi cty DA dung so — khong nhieu) · F ky khac so NPT hieu luc · THANG↔NAM: du 12 ky khoa moi doi chieu — chenh quyet toan chua co khoan PITQT hoac khoan da tao lech so hien hanh.
